message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  LifeLineBorderColor black
  ArrowColor black
  MessageFontColor black
}

participant "host" as host
participant "MultiDisplayService" as MultiDisplayService
participant "rcv" as rcv
participant "IMultipleDisplaysUiController" as IMultipleDisplaysUiController
participant "IMultipleDisplaysDelegate" as IMultipleDisplaysDelegate
participant "controller" as controller
participant "DisplaysSwapViewController" as DisplaysSwapViewController
participant "DisplaysSwapPresenter" as DisplaysSwapPresenter

MultiDisplayService -> MultiDisplayService: onDisplayAdded
MultiDisplayService -> IMultipleDisplaysUiController: updateDisplayInfos
MultiDisplayService -> MultiDisplayService: onDisplayRemoved
MultiDisplayService -> IMultipleDisplaysUiController: updateDisplayInfos
DisplaysSwapViewController -> DisplaysSwapPresenter: swap()
IMultipleDisplaysUiController -> DisplaysSwapPresenter: swap()
DisplaysSwapPresenter -> DisplaysSwapPresenter: onUpdateDisplayInfo(MultipleDisplaysUiController var1, EMultipleDisplaysAction var2)
DisplaysSwapPresenter -> DisplaysSwapPresenter: loadMonitorsIndicator()
IMultipleDisplaysDelegate -> MultiDisplayService: onUpdateDisplayInfo(MultipleDisplaysUiController var1, EMultipleDisplaysAction var2)
MultiDisplayService -> MultiDisplayService: notifyMultiDisplayChanged(type: MultiDisplayChangeType, displayId: Int)

@enduml
